inbospatial 0.0.2
  • NEWS
  • Functions
  • Tutorials
  • Contributing

Changelog

Source: NEWS.md

inbospatial 0.0.2

New functions

  • utility functions to calculate distance distortions in some projection methods
  • add_wms_*()and add_wmts_*() family of functions, which are shorthand alternatives for a fully specified leaflet::addWMSTiles(), leaflet.extras2::addWMS() or leaflet::addTiles() statement.

Enhancements

  • updated vignette demonstrating get_features_wfs() and get_coverage_wcs()
  • improved error handling in get_features_wfs() (#3)

Bug fixes

  • Minor changes to fix failing GitHub actions

inbospatial 0.0.1

  • Added a NEWS.md file to track changes to the package.
  • New function get_features_wfs to get features (vector data) from a Web Feature Service (WFS)
  • New function get_coverage_wcs to get raster data from a Web Coverage Service (WCS)

Contents

Developed by Hans Van Calster, .

Site built with pkgdown 2.0.7.
